name: Alex Mercer
title: AI-Native Full-Stack Developer
tagline: Building the future at the intersection of human creativity and machine intelligence.
bio: I'm a senior developer with 8+ years of experience who has fully embraced the AI-native paradigm. I don't just use AI tools — I architect systems where human intuition and machine intelligence amplify each other. My work spans from low-latency ML inference pipelines to the delicate craft of designing interfaces that feel alive.

experience.description: Leading the design and implementation of Nexus's core AI orchestration platform, enabling 200+ enterprise clients to deploy custom AI agents at scale.
achievements: Architected a multi-agent orchestration system processing 50M+ tokens/day with 99.95% uptime
Reduced LLM inference costs by 62% through intelligent caching and prompt compression strategies
Built a real-time RAG pipeline over 10TB of client data using Pinecone + custom embedding models
Grew AI platform team from 3 to 12 engineers; introduced async-first culture and AI-assisted code reviews
Shipped 6 major product releases in 18 months, each delivered on time

experience.description: Owned the developer dashboard and SDK tooling that serves 4M+ developers worldwide. Focused on reducing time-to-first-payment for new integrations.
achievements: Rebuilt the API Explorer tool, increasing daily active usage by 340%
Shipped the first AI-powered error explanation feature in Stripe's dashboard using GPT-3
Reduced median time-to-first-payment for new signups from 4.2 days to 1.8 days
Maintained zero downtime for dashboard during 3 major infrastructure migrations
Mentored 8 junior engineers; 4 were promoted to senior within 18 months

experience.description: Early-stage engineer (employee #31) working on the Edge Network and runtime that powers millions of Next.js deployments globally.
achievements: Implemented key features of the Edge Runtime including streaming responses and middleware
Reduced cold start times for serverless functions by 45% through V8 snapshot optimization
Contributed to open-source Next.js: 23 merged PRs, 1,400+ GitHub stars on personal contributions
Helped scale edge network from 12 to 47 PoPs globally

experience.description: Built custom software and early ML-powered products for startups in fintech, healthtech, and e-commerce. Specialized in turning prototypes into production-grade systems.
achievements: Delivered 12 projects end-to-end across 4 industries with 100% client satisfaction
Built a real-time fraud detection system for a fintech startup, reducing fraud losses by 78%
Created an NLP-powered document review tool for a legal tech company (trained on 100K+ legal docs)

highlights: Thesis: 'Attention Mechanisms in Sequential Decision Making'
Teaching Assistant for CS189: Introduction to Machine Learning
Founding member of AI@Berkeley student organization

openSource.description: Utility library for streaming Anthropic/OpenAI responses in Next.js App Router
TypeScript toolkit for structured prompt engineering with validation and versioning
